title: [ExportVerilog] Verilator warnings in output
body:
When compiled with `firtool` to a SystemVerilog file, `verilator --lint-only` produces some warnings;
```
hw.module @Atomics(%x: i2, %y: i2, %io_a_mask: i1, %z: i8) -> (io_data_out: i8) {
    %c0_i8 = hw.constant 0 : i8
    %2 = comb.mux %io_a_mask, %x, %y : i2
    %3 = hw.array_create %c0_i8, %z, %c0_i8, %z : i8
    %4 = hw.array_get %3[%2] : !hw.array<4xi8>
    hw.output %4 : i8
}
```

```
%Warning-WIDTH: test.sv:10:39: Operator COND expects 32 or 4 bits on the Conditional True, but Conditional True's VARREF 'x' generates 2 bits.
                             : ... In instance Atomics
   10 |   assign io_data_out = _GEN[io_a_mask ? x : y];  
      |                                       ^
                ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/WIDTH?v=4.214
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Warning-WIDTH: test.sv:10:39: Operator COND expects 32 or 4 bits on the Conditional False, but Conditional False's VARREF 'y' generates 2 bits.
                             : ... In instance Atomics
   10 |   assign io_data_out = _GEN[io_a_mask ? x : y];  
      |                                       ^
%Error: Exiting due to 2 warning(s)
```
